popular_posts.title: Why We Migrated from Google ADK to Microsoft MARA
popular_posts.subtitle: The philosophy, trade-offs, and what we learned converting 18+ agents in 3 months.
popular_posts.excerpt: The philosophy, trade-offs, and what we learned converting 18+ agents in 3 months. Provider abstraction as the foundation for portable agents.

popular_posts.title: Lessons from Converting 18 Agents in 90 Days
popular_posts.subtitle: The patterns that worked, the traps we fell into, and what we'd do differently.
popular_posts.excerpt: What worked, what was hard, and what we'd do differently. Real numbers: 18 agents, 90 days, 5 governance policies, 4 provider swaps.
